description: You are a sustainability specialist at an energy consulting firm. For the 4StoreyBuilding commercial facility, implement an Energy Conservation Measure (ECM) package targeting cool-surface compliance and improved free-cooling. Reduce the solar absorptance of 'EWall Construction' and 'Roof Construction' to 0.45. For all five Ground Floor (G.*) packaged single-zone HVAC systems, set the dry-bulb economizer temperature limit (DRYBULB-LIMIT) to 65°F. Run a full annual DOE-2.2 simulation to quantify energy savings and save the project.
